title: achillea ligustica
intro: Achillea ligustica, also known as Yarrow, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Achillea ligustica include reducing menstrual cramps, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Yarrow can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and reduce fever.
